title: eulophia spectabilis
intro: Eulophia spectabilis is a species of orchid, commonly known as the 'Yellow Banded Orchid' due to its vibrant yellow and green striped flowers. Traditionally, Eulophia spectabilis has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is believed to possess various medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Eulophia spectabilis is often used as a decoction or infusion, where the roots and flowers are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
